items.title_en: Claude Opus 4.7
items.title_zh: Claude Opus 4.7 版本发布
items.summary_en: Claude Opus 4.7 advances developer-focused AI capabilities with stronger reasoning, safety features, and tooling for complex agent workflows. It signals Anthropic's push toward more capable, enterprise-ready assistants.
items.summary_zh: Claude Opus 4.7 在推理、安全性和代理工作流工具方面提升，面向开发者的 AI 助手更强大。此次更新体现了 Anthropic 向企业级应用扩展能力的方向。

items.title_en: Codex for almost everything
items.title_zh: 几乎适用于一切场景的 Codex
items.summary_en: OpenAI expands Codex beyond code generation into a broader set of tasks, positioning it as a universal AI assistant for developers and operators. The move signals growing demand for single-model copilots that can handle coding, data tasks, automation, and workflow integration, reducing context-switching.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 将 Codex 的应用扩展到广泛任务，将其定位为开发者与运维的通用 AI 助手。此举反映出市场对单一模型兼顾编码、数据处理、自动化与工作流整合的需求日增，减少上下文切换。

items.title_en: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B: Agentic coding power, now open to all
items.title_zh: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B：代理编码能力，现向所有人开放
items.summary_en: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B releases with agentic coding capabilities, enabling more autonomous tool use and automation. Open availability broadens access for developers to build AI-powered coding assistants.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B 发布，具备代理式编码能力，支持更自主的工具使用与自动化。公开开放让开发者更易打造 AI 驱动的编码助手。

items.title_en: Discourse Is Not Going Closed Source
items.title_zh: Discourse 不会走向闭源
items.summary_en: Discourse confirms it will stay open-source and maintains transparency around its software. The stance matters for communities relying on open platforms, potentially affecting future pricing, feature development, and governance.
items.summary_zh: Discourse 确认将继续维持开源生态，保持软件的透明度。这一立场关系到使用该平台的社区，对未来定价、功能开发及治理产生影响。

items.title_en: Everything we like is a psyop?
items.title_zh: 我们喜欢的一切都是心理战吗
items.summary_en: A TechCrunch piece argues that much of what we enjoy is shaped by psychological operations, highlighting how media, marketing, and social design influence taste and behavior. It cautions readers to question narratives and maintain healthy skepticism.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch 指出，我们喜爱的很多东西可能被心理战操控，媒体、营销和社交设计对口味与行为具有放大效应。文章提醒读者保持批判性思维，避免被表象驱动的叙事带偏。

items.title_en: US Bill Mandates On-Device Age Verification
items.title_zh: 美国法案要求设备端进行年龄验证
items.summary_en: New US bill proposes on-device age verification, raising privacy and accessibility questions. While aiming to curb underage access, critics warn about potential privacy erosion and user friction across devices.
items.summary_zh: 该法案要求在设备端进行年龄验证，意在限制未成年用户访问某些内容。批评者担心隐私侵蚀、用户体验受阻及在不同设备上的落地难题。

items.title_en: The "Passive Income" trap ate a generation of entrepreneurs
items.title_zh: “被动收入陷阱吞噬了一代创业者”
items.summary_en: The 'passive income' dream attracted a generation of entrepreneurs who chased effortless earnings, often via courses, scams, or ineffective automation. The piece argues the trap distracted people from building durable products and real cash flow.
items.summary_zh: '被动收入'的幻觉吸引了一代创业者，许多人追求不劳而获的收益，往往通过课程、骗局或无效的自动化实现。文章指出这类陷阱让人偏离打造可持续产品与稳定现金流的现实路径。

items.title_en: The future of everything is lies, I guess: Where do we go from here?
items.title_zh: 未来一切都是谎言？我们该往何处走？
items.summary_en: Aphyr argues that grand narratives around 'the future of everything' are dangerous and that we need pragmatic, testable approaches to technology. He advocates clearer accountability, honest risk assessment, and building robust systems rather than chasing sensational predictions.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为关于‘一切的未来’的宏大叙事往往误导，需要以可验证、务实的技术路径取代。倡导明确的问责、真实的风险评估，以及构建鲁棒系统，而非追捧耸人听闻的预言。

items.title_en: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B on my laptop drew me a better pelican than Claude Opus 4.7
items.title_zh: 在笔记本上用 Qwen3.6-35B-A3B 画出比 Claude Opus 4.7 更好的鹈鹕
items.summary_en: A personal test comparing local LLMs shows Qwen3.6-35B-A3B on a laptop reportedly produces a better pelican image than Claude Opus 4.7. It suggests capable performance from local models without heavy cloud compute, hinting at shifting workloads to open hardware.
items.summary_zh: 作者在本地笔记本上使用 Qwen3.6-35B-A3B 生成的鹈鹕图像胜过 Claude Opus 4.7，显示本地高效模型也能交付出色结果。此类对比凸显将部分 AI 工作负载转移到本地硬件的可行性与成本优势。

items.title_en: New unsealed records reveal Amazon's price-fixing tactics, California AG claims
items.title_zh: 新解封记录披露亚马逊定价策略，加州检方指控
items.summary_en: Unsealed records reportedly reveal Amazon’s price-fixing tactics, per California AG claims. The disclosures could intensify antitrust scrutiny, influencing regulatory actions and consumer perceptions of online pricing.
items.summary_zh: 据称，解封记录揭示了亚马逊的定价策略，加州总检察长据此提出指控。这些披露可能加剧反垄断审查，影响监管行动与消费者对线上定价的看法。

items.title_en: Bluesky has been dealing with a DDoS attack for nearly a full day
items.title_zh: Bluesky 遭遇持续一整天的DDoS攻击
items.summary_en: Bluesky has been under a distributed denial-of-service attack for roughly a full day, testing its resilience and mitigations as a smaller social network. The incident underscores how platform size shapes DDoS risk and why robust defense and traffic scrubbing matter for growing services.
items.summary_zh: Bluesky 持续遭遇约一天的分布式拒绝服务攻击，考验了小型社交平台的韧性与应急措施。此次事件突显了平台规模对 DDoS 风险的影响，以及强韧防护与流量清洗在新兴服务中的重要性。

items.title_en: Cloudflare Email Service
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 推出面向代理的邮件服务
items.summary_en: Cloudflare launches Email for Agents, a scalable backend designed for AI agents to send and receive mail with edge-optimized reliability. It highlights a trend of embedding email capabilities into AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出面向代理的电子邮件服务，提供可在边缘基础设施上高效发送接收邮件的后端，方便 AI 助手执行业务通信。

items.title_en: Guy builds AI driven hardware hacker arm from duct tape, old cam and CNC machine
items.title_zh: 用胶带、旧摄像头和数控机床打造的 AI 驱动硬件黑客臂
items.summary_en: A DIY project shows an AI-driven robotic arm assembled from duct tape, an old camera, and a CNC machine. It demonstrates how accessible components and lightweight AI tooling can accelerate hardware-hacking workflows and rapid prototyping.
items.summary_zh: 这名爱好者用胶带、旧摄像头和数控机床组装了一只 AI 驱动的硬件黑客臂，展示了低成本材料与 AI 工具链在快速原型与硬件开发中的潜力。

items.title_en: Android CLI: Build Android apps 3x faster using any agent
items.title_zh: Android CLI：用任意代理将应用构建速度提高 3 倍
items.summary_en: Google highlights a new Android CLI workflow that offloads build steps to any agent, enabling parallelization and faster turnaround. The approach unlocks faster app iteration in both local and CI environments.
items.summary_zh: Android CLI 引入可将构建任务分发给任意代理的工作流，实现并行化和约 3 倍的提速。此举有助于本地和持续集成环境中的应用迭代更快。

items.title_en: Official Clojure Documentary page with Video, Shownotes, and Links
items.title_zh: 官方 Clojure 纪录片页面，含视频与资料链接
items.summary_en: The documentary page for Clojure bundles video, show notes, and links that trace the language's origins, philosophy, and ecosystem. It serves as a focused resource for both newcomers and long-time fans to explore Clojure's impact.
items.summary_zh: Clojure 官方纪录片页面提供视频、讲解要点和相关链接，梳理该语言的起源、哲学及生态系统。为新手和长期拥护者提供深入了解 Clojure 影响的资源。

items.title_en: Show HN: SPICE simulation → oscilloscope → verification with Claude Code
items.title_zh: Show HN: Spice 仿真 → 示波器 → 使用 Claude Code 验证
items.summary_en: A post demonstrates an end-to-end verification flow: run a SPICE simulation, measure the same circuit on an oscilloscope, and validate results with Claude Code. This illustrates how AI-assisted tooling can streamline hardware validation and catch discrepancies early.
items.summary_zh: 一个展示端到端验证流程的帖子：先用 SPICE 仿真，再用示波器测量同一电路，最后用 Claude Code 进行结果验证。这体现了 AI 辅助工具在硬件验证中的潜力，能帮助更早发现不一致。

items.title_en: Human Accelerated Region 1
items.title_zh: 人类快速进化区域 HAR1
items.summary_en: HAR1 is a regulatory region showing accelerated evolution in humans versus other species, with potential roles in brain development and gene regulation. It illustrates how specific noncoding elements may contribute to human-specific traits, while proving challenging to link sequence changes to function.
items.summary_zh: HAR1 是一个在人类中进化速率显著加快的调控区域，与其他物种相比存在差异，可能在大脑发育与基因调控中发挥作用。文章阐明了非编码元件如何可能促成与人类特征相关的改变，同时将序列变异与功能之间的联系挑战性。

items.title_en: FCC exempts Netgear from ban on foreign routers, doesn't explain why
items.title_zh: FCC 免除 Netgear 外国路由器禁令却未给出解释
items.summary_en: The FCC exempted Netgear from a ban on foreign routers but provided no explanation, raising questions about regulatory reasoning and potential security or competition considerations.
items.summary_zh: FCC 免除了 Netgear 外国路由器禁令，但未给出解释，引发对监管逻辑以及潜在安全或竞争因素的质疑。

items.title_en: A Better R Programming Experience Thanks to Tree-sitter
items.title_zh: 借助 Tree-sitter 提升的 R 语言编程体验
items.summary_en: Tree-sitter integration delivers fast incremental parsing for R tooling, enabling snappier syntax highlighting, navigation, and code analysis across editors. It improves the R development experience by making tooling more responsive and consistent.
items.summary_zh: Tree-sitter 的整合为 R 的工具链带来增量解析，使编辑器中的语法高亮、导航和错误检测更加迅速一致，提升开发效率。跨编辑器的协作和代码维护也因此更加顺畅。

items.title_en: Cloudflare's AI Platform: an inference layer designed for agents
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 的 AI 平台：面向代理的推断层
items.summary_en: Cloudflare unveils an AI Platform with an inference layer tailored for autonomous agents, enabling developers to run agent-powered workflows at scale with privacy and edge considerations. This marks Cloudflare's broader shift toward AI infrastructure, complementing its edge network.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出 AI 平台，提供面向代理的推断层，使开发者能够在规模化环境中以隐私与边缘计算为考量部署代理驱动的工作流。这标志着 Cloudflare 在 AI 基础设施领域的扩张。

items.title_en: Playdate’s handheld changed how Duke University teaches game design
items.title_zh: Playdate 手持设备改变了杜克大学游戏设计教学
items.summary_en: Duke University has integrated the Playdate handheld into its game design curriculum, shifting how students approach the craft. The device’s unique inputs and constraints spur rapid prototyping and iterative design, illustrating hardware-enabled pedagogy.
items.summary_zh: 杜克大学在课程中引入 Playdate 手持机，改变了游戏设计的教学方式。独特的输入体验和时间约束促使学生进行快速迭代与原型化，成为教育领域硬件辅助教学的典型案例。

items.title_en: Codex Hacked a Samsung TV
items.title_zh: Codex 破解 Samsung 电视
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate that a Samsung TV can be hacked using Codex-inspired techniques, underscoring the security risks in smart TVs and the need for robust firmware protections.
items.summary_zh: 研究者演示了利用 Codex 风格的技术入侵三星电视，凸显智能电视的安全风险以及加强固件保护的必要性。

items.title_en: Artifacts: Versioned storage that speaks Git
items.title_zh: Artifacts：像 Git 一样的版本化存储
items.summary_en: Artifacts introduces Git-backed, versioned storage designed for agents to version data and collaborate, blurring lines between code and data storage.
items.summary_zh: Artifacts 推出以 Git 为底层的版本化存储，面向代理用来管理数据版本并协作，模糊了代码与数据存储的边界。

items.title_en: AI cybersecurity is not proof of work
items.title_zh: AI 安全性并非工作量证明
items.summary_en: The piece argues that AI-based cybersecurity cannot replace fundamental security practices or proof-of-work style verification. It emphasizes human oversight, layered defenses, and ongoing auditing as essential.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，AI 驱动的网络安全不能取代基本的安全实践或类似工作量证明的验证，强调需要人类监督、分层防御和持续审计。

items.title_en: US tech firms lobbied EU to keep datacentre emissions secret
items.title_zh: 美企游说欧盟以保密数据中心排放信息
items.summary_en: US tech firms lobbied the EU to keep datacentre emissions secret, raising questions about transparency and climate accountability.
items.summary_zh: 美国科技公司游说欧盟以保密数据中心排放信息，引发对透明度与气候问责的讨论。文章分析了披露要求与竞争考量之间的紧张关系。

items.title_en: GPT‑Rosalind for life sciences research
items.title_zh: GPT-Rosalind：面向生命科学研究的 AI 助手
items.summary_en: GPT-Rosalind extends specialized AI to life sciences research, offering domain-tailored reasoning and data analysis to help researchers interpret biological data and run experiments more efficiently. It signals growing AI tooling for scientific workflows.
items.summary_zh: GPT-Rosalind 将专门为生命科学研究定制的 AI 能力引入研究工作流，帮助研究者分析数据、解释结果并提升实验效率，体现科研领域 AI 工具的日益增长。

items.title_en: Show HN: MacMind – A transformer neural network in HyperCard on a 1989 Macintosh
items.title_zh: MacMind：在 1989 年的 Macintosh 的 HyperCard 上实现 Transformer 神经网络
items.summary_en: MacMind runs a Transformer neural network inside a HyperCard stack on a 1989 Macintosh, a playful demonstration of hardware-limited ML.
items.summary_zh: MacMind 在 1989 年的 Macintosh 上的 HyperCard 中实现了 Transformer 神经网络，展现了在极端硬件条件下运行 ML 的可能性。

items.title_en: The beginning of scarcity in AI
items.title_zh: AI 资源短缺的开端
items.summary_en: The piece argues that AI compute demand is outpacing supply, signaling an emerging scarcity as accelerators, GPUs, and data-center capacity tighten. It discusses implications for funding, model iteration cadence, and the tradeoffs among scale, latency, and cost.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 AI 计算需求正超出供给，随着加速器、GPU 与数据中心容量趋紧，出现资源稀缺的征兆。内容讨论了对资金、模型迭代节奏以及规模、延迟与成本之间取舍的影响。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Kampala (YC W26) – Reverse-Engineer Apps into APIs
items.title_zh: Kampala（YC W26）— 将应用反向工程为 API
items.summary_en: Kampala enables reverse-engineering existing apps into APIs to unlock automation and integration with LLMs. This approach helps teams quickly compose capabilities from legacy apps, bypassing heavy API design.
items.summary_zh: Kampala 让现有应用反向工程化为 API，以便快速将其功能接入自动化工作流和大语言模型。此思路有助于团队绕过繁琐的 API 设计，直接实现对旧系统的集成。

items.title_en: RedSun: System user access on Win 11/10 and Server with the April 2026 Update
items.title_zh: RedSun：4月2026更新后 Windows 11/10 与 Server 的系统账户访问
items.summary_en: RedSun demonstrates a privilege-escalation path that could grant system-level access on Windows 11/10 and Windows Server after the April 2026 update. The project highlights potential security gaps and suggests mitigations for defenders.
items.summary_zh: RedSun 展示了一条可能在 2026 年 4 月更新后让系统级权限获得的提权路径，影响 Windows 11/10 与 Windows Server。该项目暴露了潜在的安全缺口，并为防守端提供了缓解思路。

items.title_en: FIM – Linux framebuffer image viewer
items.title_zh: FIM：Linux 帧缓冲图像查看器
items.summary_en: FIM is a lightweight Linux framebuffer image viewer that runs without X, quickly rendering common image formats directly from the frame buffer. It includes improvements over the original fbi and shines in embedded or minimal setups where a GUI is unnecessary.
items.summary_zh: FIM 是一个轻量的 Linux 帧缓冲图像查看器，可在无 X 环境下直接从帧缓冲渲染常用图像格式，响应迅速。相比原版 fbi 它有改进，适用于嵌入式或极简环境中无需 GUI 的场景。

items.title_en: German Dog Commands
items.title_zh: 德语训犬指令
items.summary_en: German dog commands provide a practical compilation of common instructions, useful for learners training dogs with German cues.
items.summary_zh: 德语训犬指令提供常用指令的实用汇编，便于以德语进行犬只训练和沟通。

items.title_en: North American English Dialects
items.title_zh: 北美英语方言
items.summary_en: A survey of North American English dialects, featuring descriptions and audio samples that illustrate regional variation in pronunciation, vocabulary, and usage.
items.summary_zh: 北美英语方言的汇编，结合描述与音频样例，展示了各地区在发音、词汇与用法上的差异。

items.title_en: Show HN: Marky – A lightweight Markdown viewer for agentic coding
items.title_zh: Show HN：Marky——一个为智能编码设计的轻量级 Markdown 查看器
items.summary_en: Marky presents a minimal Markdown viewer designed to fit into AI-assisted coding workflows, letting developers quickly render docs and READMEs without leaving their editor. It prioritizes speed, simplicity, and easy integration with tooling.
items.summary_zh: Marky 提供一个面向 AI 辅助编码工作流的极简 Markdown 查看器，使开发者无需离开编辑器即可快速渲染文档与自述。它强调速度、简洁和与现有工具链的易集成。

items.title_en: Cave under castle with prehistoric hippo bones 'once in a lifetime' find
items.title_zh: 城堡下洞穴发现史前河马骨骼，罕见发现
items.summary_en: A cave beneath a castle yielded a once-in-a-lifetime discovery of prehistoric hippo bones, offering a rare glimpse into ancient fauna and palaeontological preservation in a new site.
items.summary_zh: 城堡下方洞穴发现史前河马骨骼，这一罕见发现为研究古代动物群提供珍贵线索，并展示了在新地点的古生物保护价值。

items.title_en: Probabilistic engineering and the 24-7 employee
items.title_zh: 概率工程与全天候运营的挑战
items.summary_en: Probabilistic engineering argues for designing systems with uncertainty in mind, enabling reliable 24/7 operation by modeling failure modes probabilistically and planning maintenance and redundancy accordingly.
items.summary_zh: 概率工程学主张在设计中考虑不确定性，通过对故障模式进行概率建模、并据此规划维护与冗余，以实现全天候、可靠运行。

items.title_en: CadQuery is an open-source Python library for building 3D CAD models
items.title_zh: CadQuery：用于构建 3D CAD 模型的开源 Python 库
items.summary_en: CadQuery provides a Python-based API for generating parametric 3D CAD models, letting engineers script geometry instead of clicking in a GUI. Being open source, it integrates with numpy-like workflows and can speed up prototyping, automation, and reproducible design.
items.summary_zh: CadQuery 提供基于 Python 的参数化 3D CAD 建模 API，允许通过脚本生成几何形状，而非仅靠图形界面。作为开源项目，它与常用数据处理工作流易于结合，可加速原型设计、自动化和结果复现。

items.title_en: PHP 8.6 Closure Optimizations
items.title_zh: PHP 8.6 闭包优化
items.summary_en: RFC proposes optimizations for PHP closures, reducing allocation overhead and improving call performance, with expected runtime benefits.
items.summary_zh: 该 RFC 提出对 PHP 闭包的优化，降低分配开销并提升调用性能，预期带来运行时提升。

items.title_en: Six Characters
items.title_zh: 六名角色
items.summary_en: Six Characters uses six archetypes to illustrate core ideas in an Iron Core project.
items.summary_zh: 《Six Characters》用六个原型来阐释铁核项目的核心思想。

items.title_en: Show HN: CodeBurn – Analyze Claude Code token usage by task
items.title_zh: Show HN：CodeBurn — 按任务分析 Claude 代码任务的 token 使用
items.summary_en: CodeBurn analyzes Claude Code's token usage by task, helping developers understand how compute and cost scale with different inputs. It informs model selection and prompt design when integrating Claude for coding tasks.
items.summary_zh: CodeBurn 按任务分析 Claude 在代码任务中的 token 使用，帮助开发者理解不同输入对算力与成本的影响。这些洞察有助于在将 Claude 应用于代码任务时做出更明智的模型选择和提示设计。

items.title_en: ReBot-DevArm: open-source Robotic Arm
items.title_zh: ReBot-DevArm 开源机器人臂
items.summary_en: ReBot-DevArm is an open-source robotic arm project, likely modular and affordable, built by Seeed Projects. It offers a hands-on platform for learning robotics, prototyping, and hardware-software integration.
items.summary_zh: ReBot-DevArm 是一个开源机器人臂项目，通常具备模块化设计、低成本定位，便于学习机器人学、快速原型设计以及软硬件集成实验。

items.title_en: A Python Interpreter Written in Python
items.title_zh: 用 Python 自己实现的 Python 解释器
items.summary_en: A Python interpreter written in Python demonstrates how Python’s syntax and runtime can be modeled in a self-hosted environment. It highlights parsing, interpretation, and object model design, offering practical intuition for language implementers.
items.summary_zh: 本文展示一个用 Python 实现的 Python 解释器，提供对 Python 语法和运行时在自宿主环境中建模的直观演示。介绍了解析、解释执行与对象模型设计等核心挑战，给语言实现者带来实用的直觉与见解。

items.title_en: Circuit Transformations, Loop Fusion, and Inductive Proof
items.title_zh: 电路变换、循环融合与归纳证明
items.summary_en: The piece presents techniques for circuit transformations and loop fusion, backed by inductive proofs, highlighting methods for optimizing computational graphs and compiler design. It blends theory with practical implications for performance.
items.summary_zh: 文中介绍了电路变换和循环融合的技巧，并辅以归纳证明，聚焦于优化计算图与编译器设计的方法。理论与实践的结合揭示了对性能提升的实际影响。

items.title_en: IBM AP-101 general-purpose computer [pdf]
items.title_zh: IBM AP-101 通用计算机资料（PDF）
items.summary_en: This PDF documents the IBM AP-101, a general-purpose computer from the early era of computing and its Shuttle Instruction Set. It’s a valuable primary source for understanding mid-20th-century computer architecture and historical design choices.
items.summary_zh: 这份 PDF 是 IBM AP-101 通用计算机及其 Shuttle 指令集的历史资料，是理解二十世纪中叶计算架构与设计取舍的重要一手资料。

items.title_en: 30 Years of HPC: many hardware advances, little adoption of new languages
items.title_zh: 三十年 HPC：硬件进步显著，新语言采用却不多
items.summary_en: Over three decades of HPC have seen hardware progress outpace adoption of new languages in production codes. The piece argues that performance potential is real but ecosystem inertia, long validation cycles, and large legacy codebases slow uptake of modern languages like Chapel or Julia. This matters for language designers and HPC strategists planning future ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 三十年的高性能计算见证了硬件持续进步，却很少出现新语言在生产代码中的广泛应用。文章指出，性能潜力未被忽视，但生态系统惯性、长期验证周期以及庞大的遗留代码库令现代语言难以落地。这对语言设计者和 HPC 战略决策者具有重要启示。

items.title_en: A Git helper tool that breaks large merges into parallelizable tasks
items.title_zh: 将大合并拆分为可并行任务的 Git 助手工具
items.summary_en: Mergetopus is a Git helper that breaks large merges into parallelizable tasks, enabling faster integration and more scalable conflict resolution on big repositories. It distributes work across cores or workers to boost throughput during merges.
items.summary_zh: Mergetopus 将大型 Git 合并拆分为可并行的任务，从而在大型代码库中实现更快的合并、以及更具扩展性的冲突解决。它将工作分发到多核或多线程以提升吞吐量。

items.title_en: "Wretches, Speak Evil of Me": Goethe and Schiller's Xenions (1896 Edition)
items.title_zh: 《恶人，请毁谤我》：歌德与席勒的 Xenions（1896 版）
items.summary_en: "Wretches, Speak Evil of Me" presents Goethe and Schiller's Xenions (1896 edition), a historically significant collection of satirical maxims and aphorisms.
items.summary_zh: 1896 版的《恶人，请毁谤我》收录了歌德与席勒的讽刺格言，具有重要的历史意义。该卷揭示了公共领域文本如何展现19世纪文学对话与耐久的机智。

items.title_en: Century-bandwidth antenna reinvented,patented after 18 yrs with decade bandwidth
items.title_zh: 世纪带宽天线的再造：18 年后获专利实现十倍带宽
items.summary_en: A century-bandwidth antenna has been reinvented and patented after 18 years, promising broad bandwidth that could simplify multi-band communications. The design could reduce the number of front-ends needed and enable wider frequency coverage with fewer components.
items.summary_zh: 世纪带宽天线经过18年努力重新设计并获得专利，承诺实现极宽带宽，或简化多频段通信。该设计可能减少前端数量、在更少元件下实现更广的频谱覆盖。

items.title_en: Building a Web Page That Edits Itself
items.title_zh: 自我编辑的网页
items.summary_en: A single-page project builds a web page that edits itself, using client-side scripting to mutate its own DOM and optionally persist changes. It showcases self-referential, meta-programming techniques and raises questions about authorship, persistence, and browser security.
items.summary_zh: 一个单页项目实现自我编辑，前端脚本会修改自身的 DOM，并可选择性地把改动保存下来。它展示了自引用的元编程技术，同时引发关于作者、持久化与浏览器安全性的讨论。
